pages.raw_text:
The Central Labor union last
night instructed its secretary to
wire the election returns from this
state to Gompers, president of the
American Federation of Labor. The
fact that this action was
unanimous on the part of the dele
gates present would indicate that
the federation will receive consid-
cradle support from the dinner pail
brigade in the election today.


The attention of the central body
was called to the effort being made
by Tefft & Schaffer, the unfair ice
and Single manufacturers, to- or
ganize a hockey league to play at
their ice rink this winter 1t was
reported that the Canadian teams
would not play at the rink in this
city if notified that it was unfair
to organized labor.
